name: Rubber Compound Residue
description: Rubber Compound Residue (C₅H₈, Sulfur, Carbon Black) is a common contamination pattern in laser cleaning. This organic-residue/polymer contamination affects surface integrity and requires specialized removal techniques. Commonly found on 15 different material types including metals, composites, and specialized substrates.

Compound: Carbon Monoxide
variableMeasured.description:
When dealing with carbon monoxide, watch its sneaky toxicity right away. Unlike oxygen, which sustains life, this gas binds tightly to your blood. That starves cells of what they need.
